patch:
--- a/counter.sv
+++ b/counter.sv
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 module counter_16bit(
     input clk,
     input rst,
-    input [15:0] load_val,
+    input [15:0] load_value,
     input load_en,
     output [15:0] count_out
 );
@@ -13,7 +13,7 @@
 module top();
     logic clk, rst, load_en;
     logic [15:0] load_data, counter_output;
     counter_16bit inst(
-        .load_val(load_data),
+        .load_value(load_data),
         .load_en(load_en),
         .count_out(counter_output),
         .clk(clk),
